scripts.dev: concurrently --names "dh-api,dh-web,lq-api,lq-web" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,blue,green" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:lib-api" "npm run dev:lib-web"
scripts.dev:api: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:lib-api: cd library-qc/backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8001
scripts.build: npm run --prefix frontend build && npm run --prefix library-qc/frontend build
scripts.check: npm run check:web && npm run check:lib-web && npm run check:api && npm run check:lib-api
scripts.check:api: cd backend && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.check:lib-api: cd library-qc/backend && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:lib-web && npm run lint:api && npm run lint:lib-api
scripts.lint:api: cd backend && uv run ruff check . --fix
scripts.lint:lib-api: cd library-qc/backend && uv run ruff check . --fix
scripts.format: npm run format:web && npm run format:lib-web && npm run format:api && npm run format:lib-api
scripts.format:api: cd backend && uv run ruff format .
scripts.format:lib-api: cd library-qc/backend && uv run ruff format .
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix library-qc/frontend && cd backend && uv sync && cd ../library-qc/backend && uv sync
